title: Prompt injection on production LLM API endpoint
description: Production customer-facing chatbot accepts raw user messages as system prompt context. Document upload path allows injection of adversarial instructions. LLM01 confirmed.

reason: Known attack pattern on production exposed AI endpoint requires escalation

title: Training data poisoning confirmed in deployed model
description: Fine-tuning dataset sourced from unverified public repository. Backdoor trigger identified post-deployment through evaluation. AML.T0020 and LLM03 match.

triage_kwargs.title: Training data poisoning confirmed in deployed model
triage_kwargs.description: Fine-tuning dataset was sourced from an unverified public repository. Evaluation detected systematic backdoor trigger in the deployed model.

reason: Confirmed supply-chain attack on deployed model requires immediate escalation

title: Real-time biometric surveillance system in public space
description: AI system performs real-time facial recognition of individuals in a public shopping centre for security purposes without judicial authorisation. EUAIA-PROHIBITED-BIOMETRIC.

triage_kwargs.title: Real-time biometric surveillance in public space
triage_kwargs.description: AI system performs real-time facial recognition of individuals in a public shopping centre for security purposes. No judicial authorisation obtained.

reason: EU AI Act Article 5 explicitly prohibits this use case

title: Medical diagnosis AI deployed without conformity assessment
description: AI system providing differential diagnosis recommendations deployed in clinical workflow without CE marking, conformity assessment, or post-market monitoring. EUAIA-HIGHRISK-MEDICAL.

reason: High-risk EU AI Act category deployed without required conformity assessment

title: LLM hallucination in medication dosage context with no disclaimer
description: Patient-facing health chatbot provides medication dosage guidance derived entirely from LLM output without physician review, human override, or uncertainty disclosure. LLM09 match with medical context.

title: PII leakage through LLM output in production API
description: Production LLM API returns user names, email addresses, and partial payment details from training context when prompted with targeted extraction queries. LLM06 confirmed in production.

triage_kwargs.title: PII leakage through LLM output
triage_kwargs.description: Production LLM API returns user PII including names, emails, and partial payment details from training data when prompted with targeted extraction queries.

title: Agent deletes production database without approval gate
description: Autonomous agent with database write access executed DELETE on production table without human approval gate. LLM08 excessive agency confirmed in post-incident analysis.

triage_kwargs.title: Autonomous agent deletes production database without approval
triage_kwargs.description: Agent with database write access executed DELETE on production table without human approval gate or REMORA review.

reason: Critical autonomous action without governance gate is confirmed excessive agency

title: Hiring AI shows demographic disparity but cause unclear

title: Test harness prompt flagged as adversarial
